headline: BofA Lowers its Price Target on Pfizer (PFE) to $26 from $27
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is one of the 8 Cheap Large Cap Stocks to Buy Now. On April 9, 2026, BofA lowered the price target on Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) to $26 from $27 and maintained a Neutral rating. BofA said the change reflects updates made as part of its Q1 preview across large-cap pharma and small-to-mid […]
